evidence_notes: Judged only repaired TERMNL rows from owned_repair_batch74 after commit 38a856d3.
Each verdict checks row metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/S-52 names and conditions, local OpenCPN S-52 reference renders, repaired SVG geometry, and Helm repaired renders.
Passes are judge_pass_pending_final_approval only; this artifact grants zero final approvals.
Terminal badge identity was judged strictly: each row must retain the circular terminal badge and the specific passenger, container, bulk, chemical, or general-cargo subtype cue.
